scope.item-1: Prepare krotpn.xyz and *.krotpn.xyz public edge validation after DNS and wildcard TLS readiness.
scope.item-2: Keep deploy/install scripts unchanged; Phase-32 local execution only defines nginx/config contracts and smoke gates.

preflight.gate-1: DNS A or AAAA for krotpn.xyz points to the intended RU edge host.
preflight.gate-2: Wildcard DNS for issued MTProto SNI names under *.krotpn.xyz resolves to the same edge host.
preflight.gate-3: Trusted wildcard certificate material is installed at /etc/nginx/ssl/server.crt and /etc/nginx/ssl/server.key, or those paths are symlinks to the trusted certificate files.
preflight.gate-4: Certificate validation must pass without curl -k, browser trust bypass, or self-signed production claims.

operator-live-smoke.check-1: http://krotpn.xyz and http://www.krotpn.xyz return a permanent redirect to https://krotpn.xyz.
operator-live-smoke.check-2: https://krotpn.xyz, https://krotpn.xyz/api health, and https://krotpn.xyz/admin remain reachable.
operator-live-smoke.check-3: One issued MTProto SNI under *.krotpn.xyz reaches the MTProto runtime route after shared-edge enablement.
operator-live-smoke.check-4: Unknown SNI fails closed or falls back only according to the active edge policy and never logs secrets.

rollback.step-1: Disable the shared 443 classifier or set EDGE_SHARED_443_ENABLED=false.
rollback.step-2: Restore nginx-only 443 ownership with the default HTTPS server blocks in nginx/nginx.conf.
rollback.step-3: Reload nginx and verify frontend, /api, and /admin are reachable through HTTPS.
rollback.step-4: Keep issued MTProto assignments in Postgres; do not rotate secrets unless the incident requires explicit reissue.

redaction.rule-1: Do not paste certificate private keys, .env values, MTPROTO_BASE_SECRET_HEX, MTPROTO_SECRET_SALT, derived secrets, tg://proxy links, JWTs, or email verification tokens into evidence.
redaction.rule-2: Allowed evidence: hostnames, status codes, certificate issuer and expiry, redacted SNI suffixes, and safe route names.
